templates.description: Cross-section with dimension lines and material hatching — useful for mechanical parts, fluid channels, structural cross-sections, or any engineering drawing that needs precise dimensioning and material indication

Combined 2D cross-section and 3D structural view with applied load arrows — useful for structural analysis figures, force diagrams, material testing setups, or any diagram mixing a detail view with a 3D overview
Layered instrument cross-section with optical path and component labels — useful for scientific instrument diagrams, microscopy setups, optical bench layouts, or any vertically-stacked system cutaway
